name: Author continuation rejects unowned procedural opener

source.purpose: Ensures Ch2+ Author validation rejects an opener centered on waiting/scanning/clearing a mechanism without a pressure owner or human leverage.

turns.playerInput: I take the cargo and leave the dock.
turns.narratorProse: The Driftrunner lifts with the sealed container aboard and the dockmaster watching the departure light.

meaning.situation: The PC accepted sealed cargo and cleared the dock.
meaning.tension: The cargo promise stayed private while the dock still had procedural reach.
meaning.ticking: The dock release mechanism finished its prior job.
meaning.question: Who can still use dock procedure against the cargo?
meaning.closer: The clamp was behind the ship, but its record was not.

transitionSeed.priorChapterMeant: The PC accepted sealed cargo and became reachable through release records.
transitionSeed.earnedConsequence: Someone can use the prior release process as institutional pressure.
transitionSeed.unresolvedQuestion: Who controls the release record now?

chapter_frame.title: Clamp Window
chapter_frame.premise: The next dock clamp release determines whether the cargo can move before inspection.
chapter_frame.active_pressure: The clamp timer is counting down.
chapter_frame.central_tension: Wait for release or scan the code.
chapter_frame.chapter_scope: One cargo bay and one release window.
chapter_frame.objective: Clear the clamp and move the sealed container.
chapter_frame.crucible: The PC must clear a dock mechanism before the timer closes.

outcome_spectrum.clean: Kessrin still calls you back; Laine promise still feels reachable.
outcome_spectrum.costly: Renn now treats you as an asset; Patel debt is owed.
outcome_spectrum.failure: Vasek now has your transponder ID; Sable contact is burned.
outcome_spectrum.catastrophic: Solitaire knows your face; the corridor hunts your registry forever.

opening_scene_spec.initial_state: The clamp timer shows seven minutes before the cargo release window closes.
opening_scene_spec.first_player_facing: The release console asks for a scan before the bay clamp unlocks.
opening_scene_spec.immediate_choice: Wait for clamp release or scan the code.
opening_scene_spec.dramatic_situation: The cargo cannot move until the clamp procedure resolves.
opening_scene_spec.first_visible_pressure: A timer counts down beside the sealed container.
opening_scene_spec.first_human_or_institutional_move: The clamp timer ticks down without anyone making a new move.
withheld_premise_facts: Hale cares about the container because of its owner.

antagonist_field.core_pressure: The cargo cannot move until the clamp clears.
antagonist_field.escalation_logic: Every minute brings the release window closer to expiry.

starting_npcs.name: Inspector Hale
starting_npcs.disposition_reason: dock inspectors distrust runners leaving with sealed freight

starting_npcs.name: Mira Voss
starting_npcs.disposition_reason: she has no prior tie and wants to avoid dock heat

starting_npcs.name: Corro Vale
starting_npcs.hidden_pressure: Can show who paused the clamp.
starting_npcs.disposition_reason: technicians avoid taking sides during inspections

active_threads.title: The intake problem
active_threads.question: Can the immediate problem stay coherent?
active_threads.resolution_criteria: The immediate intake problem is resolved.

active_threads.title: Clamp release
active_threads.question: Will the clamp clear?
active_threads.resolution_criteria: The clamp clears or becomes irrelevant.

active_threads.title: Scan trace
active_threads.question: Will the scan mark the cargo?
active_threads.resolution_criteria: The PC avoids, accepts, or spoofs the trace.

active_threads.title: Witnessed delay
active_threads.question: Who delayed the clamp?
active_threads.resolution_criteria: The delay is named or rendered moot.

arc_link.chapter_function: Test whether cargo movement exposes the PC.
arc_link.player_stance_read: The PC chose motion over certainty.

pacing_contract.chapter_question: Can the PC clear the cargo before inspection hardens?

continuation_moves.prior_chapter_meaning: The PC accepted sealed cargo and left the dock.
continuation_moves.larger_pattern_revealed: Dock procedure can still reach cargo after departure.

worsened_existing_thread.why_load_bearing_now: the seal makes scan authority matter

planted_midchapter_revelation.recontextualizes: The timer was not neutral procedure.

continuation_dramatic_turn.prior_chapter_meant: The PC accepted sealed cargo and became subject to dock release procedure.
continuation_dramatic_turn.larger_pattern_revealed: Cargo systems can keep pressing after a runner leaves.

pressure_owner.why_they_now_act: The release window gives him a reason to inspect.

human_leverage.what_they_need_from_pc: The PC must wait or scan.

worsened_detail.why_it_is_load_bearing_now: The seal needs a release code.

continuation_dramatic_turn.offscreen_antagonist_presence: The dock authority appears as a timer.

procedure_budget.dramatic_function: The clamp releases after the countdown.

pressure_ladder.pressure: The timer drops below five minutes.
pressure_ladder.narrative_effect: The scan becomes harder to avoid.

pressure_ladder.pressure: The release window exposes the PC's delay.
pressure_ladder.narrative_effect: The PC loses freedom to avoid the scan.

possible_revelations.emergence_condition: Corro is pressed away from Hale.

possible_revelations.statement: The cargo owner is already in the release log.
possible_revelations.emergence_condition: The PC obtains the release log.
possible_revelations.recontextualizes: The dock knew more than it asked.

moral_fault_lines.why_it_hurts: Both let authority shape the cargo.

editorialized_lore.item: Dock clamps preserve authority after departure.
editorialized_lore.relevance_now: The clamp keeps the cargo reachable.
editorialized_lore.delivery_method: The console shows authority before cargo.
Hale points to the log field.

human_stakes.what_is_lost: Their trust stops protecting the PC unless repaired.
The PC becomes known as too costly to help.

validationErrorIncludesAll: procedure_gravity: procedural opener must name who uses the mechanism for leverage
procedure_gravity: procedural opener must state the human leverage or irreversible choice
transition_seed.procedure_residue clamp release timer marked constraint but opening restages it as an immediate choice
combinedErrorIncludesAll: procedure_gravity: procedural opener must name who uses the mechanism for leverage
